name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, prop, shape, or convention
labels: enhancement

## What problem are you trying to solve

<!-- The user-facing pain, not the proposed solution. e.g. "I can't tell my staging branch
apart from feature work because the indicator paints both as `other`." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like the package to do. Code examples welcome. -->

```tsx
<BranchBeacon newProp={...} />
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem (custom classifier, fork, host-side workaround).
Helps weigh whether the addition belongs in the package or the consumer. -->

## Anything else

<!-- Edge cases, related shapes/colors/conventions, references to similar libraries. -->
